title: Collapse a `case x do nil -> "n/a"; v -> v end` into `Kernel.||/2`-free pattern match
prompt: Given the function `def name_or_default(user) do case user.name do nil -> "n/a"; v -> v end end`, refactor into two function heads. One should match `%{name: nil}` and return `"n/a"`, the other should match `%{name: name}` and return `name`. Output a complete module `defmodule MyApp.Display do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Tiny transformation; single idiom target. Well-cited failure mode (dnautics), but the fix is mechanical.
research_citation: dnautics, HN 46752907: 'case functioncall() do nil -> ... end'
